content.en:
"Tuoyu, do you want to accept Ye Tian as a disciple? I also want to accept him as a disciple!" Chen Feng, another Eternal Master, hurriedly said.

Suddenly, several Eternal Masters quarreled over Ye Tian.

Suddenly.

An Eternal Controller spoke: "There is no way to spy on the timeline and the past and future in the Boundary River, but I just checked it and found out Ye Tian's origin. He is indeed from a certain Eternal Realm, the Eternal Realm where the Qinglian Controller is located, it seems to be called the Void Region. "

"Qinglian controller, it's her, this one is much stronger than us, if you want to snatch people from Qinglian controller, I'm afraid it's not easy. "

"Hehe, in the Boundary River, there is no provision that the peak Legendary Realm Lord who comes out of the Eternal Realm must worship under the command of the native Eternal Controller, if Ye Tianzhen apprentices, the Qinglian Controller will still forcibly intervene?"

"I'm afraid that Ye Tian has already apprenticed, then we will quarrel in vain. "

"When Ye Tian comes out, we will be clear. "

......

A long time has passed, and Ye Tian is still in the eighth ~ level and has not come out.

Now, the Eternal Masters were stunned.

This is incredible, isn't it, a peak Legendary Realm Lord who is technically only a third-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord can stay in the eighth level of the Half Tooth Ancient Pagoda for such a long time?

"According to the time of the eighth level, Ye Tian is afraid that there is hope to pass the eighth level!"

Takuyu's controller muttered.

Level 8.

Ye Tian's will was on the verge of collapse again and again, but he forcibly persevered again and again.

He had never felt such a negative breakdown, more than any time before.

After this unimaginable torture, Ye Tian's will hardened again and again, and the shackles of his will seemed to be torn apart by him.

"Maybe I can use this opportunity to raise my will to the eighth order!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although this eighth level does not have the effect of improving his will, it can make his will tough, thus helping to break the shackles and bottlenecks, which is a great benefit.

It is not impossible for his will to break through and then stand up, and in the case of this near-collapse again and again, his will will break the shackles and be promoted to the eighth-order eternal will.

Another period of time passed, and this time Ye Tian's will finally changed.

Rumble!!!!!

After Ye Tian's will almost collapsed, he finally ushered in a transformation, and at this moment his will was leaping and sublimating.

His will seemed to pass through the past and the future, and transcend time.

What is the concept of the Eighth Order Eternal Will?

The fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords and half-step Eternal Masters are all at this level, and even some new Eternal Masters have the will of the Eighth Order, but they may be late or peak of the Eighth Order.

In essence, Ye Tian's will was even in the same realm as the Eternal Master.

"I wanted to break the shackles of will, but I didn't expect to break the shackles in the torture of countless years in the eighth level of the Half Tooth Tower"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After the will breakthrough, Ye Tian was more likely to withstand the grinding of the eighth level.

After another period of time, Ye Tian finally survived, because the time for the eighth level had arrived.

"Examiner, congratulations on passing the eighth level and are about to enter the ninth level!"

The Half-Tooth Ancient Tower congratulated.

Level 9!

Ye Tian had never heard of the situation of the ninth level, nor had he heard that anyone had passed the ninth level.

He only knew that someone had passed the eighth level, and then was accepted as a personal disciple by the Eternal Master, only the ninth level, and there was not even a single bit of information.

However, he knew that he had passed the eighth level, and he was afraid that it had caused the shock and discussion of countless peak Legendary Realm Lords, maybe the Eternal Controller had already come to the outside of the Halftooth Ancient Tower.

However, he still wants to break through the ninth level.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the ninth level, the ninth level is a small world, and there is only one scroll of maps in this piece of heaven and earth.

At this time, the half-tooth ancient tower reminded.

"Comprehend this scroll diagram and comprehend the secret techniques above, and you can pass the ninth level! Time limit, ten realm river years!"

When Ye Tian heard this, he was stunned.

Isn't this the ninth level?

However, this secret art must be very difficult, otherwise it would not be included in the ninth level.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged in front of this scroll and began to comprehend the secret techniques on this scroll.

I saw that there were only a few strokes on this scroll, but this stroke contained everything, and Ye Tian's will was close to this stroke, as if he had seen an endless world of rules.

He wanted to attain enlightenment, but he realized it in the last second, and seemed to forget most of it in the next second, and the more he forcibly entered enlightenment, the more he forgot.

"Why is this secret art so weird?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He finally understood the difficulty of this level, and there was no way to comprehend it at all!

If you are irritable, then you will not be able to comprehend.

So, Ye Tian calmed down, silently comprehended without a purpose, and all the other replicator bodies had collected their thoughts, and they were all comprehending this secret technique.

After a long time, Ye Tian could still feel a little effect, but if it continued like this, ten realm river years would not be enough, and he would not be able to comprehend this secret technique at all.

With the qualifications of several control-level ancestors, he couldn't comprehend this secret art, and it was conceivable that other peak Legendary Realm lords would definitely not be able to comprehend it even if they came.

I'm afraid that no one will comprehend the success of this level at all!

......

Outside the half-toothed ancient pagoda.

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords came out of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower, and another Peak Legendary Realm Lord tried to break in.

Soon.

Lord Ou Yu came out, and although he had passed the sixth level, he had stopped at the seventh level and could not pass the seventh level.

Even so, he could be considered to have fulfilled his purpose and could enter the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

When he came out and saw more than a dozen Eternal Masters, he was a little surprised.

......... ，........... ，

He also thought that these Eternal Masters were here for himself, but if he thought about it, he was the son of the Eternal Masters, and he would not learn from other Eternal Masters, so how could these Eternal Masters come for him?

"I've seen so many Eternal Masters!"

Lord Ou Yu said politely.

These Eternal Masters ignored him, and he just stood in one place, asking about the other Peak Legendary Realm Lords, only to know that someone had entered the ninth level and was currently breaking through the ninth level, and that one seemed to be still a third-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

"How can there be such a bereaved genius?"

Lord Ouyu was shocked.

At this time, Tuoyu's controller and the other eternal masters said: "Ye Tian will definitely not be able to pass the ninth level, the difficulty of the ninth level, you also know, even the half-tooth master himself has not practiced that secret technique, he put it in the ninth level, it is a test." But if Ye Tian doesn't come out, if he has to cross the ten realm river years, we will have to wait here. "

"It's only ten years of the world, but it's not long before the incarnation turns into a sculpture here, leaving a wisp of will and mind. "

"Then do it, otherwise it's too boring to wait like this. "

As a result, the incarnations of the eternal masters turned into sculptures, leaving only a wisp of will and mind, and once Ye Tian came out, they would instantly return to their incarnation state.

As time slowly passed, many of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords also left, and they didn't want to waste their time here.

However, Ye Tian's reputation gradually spread.

On this day, the white-bearded old man heard about the half-tooth ancient tower, and he was immediately shocked, and immediately came to visit Ye Tian's corpse. _
